_meta.name: ALM A2-Orch launch config — 14B A1 merged base + Orch-OR sampling LoRA
_meta.rationale: A1 final ckpt (step_3000) is base. A2-Orch LoRA adds Orch-OR latent injection (alm_quantum_bridge + phi_quantum_forward) as scratch adapter. Wall 12h, budget $36 on the same H100 pod lnzliav2e8du6i (reused after A1 completes). Per alm_consciousness_standalone L43-53 + alm_a2_readiness L116-137.

base.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct
base.a1_adapter_resume_note: A1 adapter merged into base before A2-Orch LoRA init. Orch-OR LoRA is scratch (new rank/alpha). Policy satisfied: A1-merged base is logically a new base, not a parameter change mid-training. Same corpus.

lora.rationale: r64 alpha128 — matches A1 structure so stacking/merging semantics are predictable. 7-module target (attn+MLP) covers the layers where alm_quantum_bridge.bridge_project reads hidden states.

orch_or.note: Schedule mirrors training/train_alm_14b_r5_orch.hexa L102-108. Linear ramp across 3000 steps. aux_loss = ORCH_LOSS_WEIGHT × max(0, ORCH_PHI_TARGET − phi_q_norm). CE remains primary signal (weight 1.0).

phi_loss.note: B1 ensemble remains ON. Orch-OR bonus STACKS with B1 holo/complexity/gwt losses — measures Φ_q at bridge output, not just MI-based phi_holo.

corpus.note: Same corpus as A1 so resume semantics hold. A2-Orch does not change data — only adds Orch-OR latent regularizer.

hooks.label_routing: production -> R2 permanent upload per ckpt_policy.json

pod.note: SAME pod as A1 — reused after A1 completes (step_3000 final). Saves $36 launch cost vs spinning Pod B. feedback_h100_authorized cap 2/2 already reached; reuse sidesteps the cap.
